title: Smoky Taco Sliders
description: A twist on traditional tacos, these smoky sliders are packed with flavor and perfect for a quick dinner or snack.

ingredients.name: intense chipotle peppers in adobo sauce

instructions: 1. In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of cooking oil over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped chipotle peppers and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until fragrant.
3. Add the cumin and smoky paprika to the pan and stir to combine.
4. Brush the tortillas with the remaining 1 tablespoon of cooking oil.
5. Place the tortillas in the pan and cook for 30 seconds to 1 minute on each side, or until slightly charred.
6. In a separate pan, cook the cheese blend over medium heat until melted and bubbly.
7. Assemble the sliders by placing a spoonful of the cheese mixture onto a tortilla, followed by a spoonful of the chipotle pepper mixture.
8. Top with chopped spring onions and a sprinkle of cilantro (if using).
